example_cases.description: Single bubble positioned at 6 o'clock in ring layout
example_cases.expected_output: One BubbleState with position_angle corresponding to 6 o'clock (π/2 or 270°). Color=#534AB7 (purple/running).
example_cases.setup: Mock state with 1 running context. Render pet component.

example_cases.description: Two bubbles positioned at 4 and 8 o'clock in ring layout
example_cases.expected_output: Two BubbleState objects at 4 o'clock and 8 o'clock positions. No overlap with pet sprite.

example_cases.description: Three bubbles positioned at 2, 6, and 10 o'clock in ring layout
example_cases.expected_output: Three BubbleState objects at 2, 6, 10 o'clock positions.

example_cases.description: Four bubbles positioned at 1, 4, 7, and 10 o'clock in ring layout
example_cases.expected_output: Four BubbleState objects at 1, 4, 7, 10 o'clock positions. No overlapping.
example_cases.setup: Mock state with 4 contexts of different statuses.

example_cases.description: Bubble color mapping: running=purple(#534AB7), done=teal(#5cb8a5), stuck=amber(#C4956A), parked=gray(#928f9e)
example_cases.input: Render pet with 4 contexts: one running, one done, one stuck, one parked
example_cases.expected_output: Bubble colors match: running=#534AB7, done=#5cb8a5, stuck=#C4956A, parked=#928f9e
example_cases.setup: Mock state with 4 contexts in different statuses.

example_cases.description: Status change triggers 0.5s color transition animation on bubble
example_cases.input: Emit state_change event: context status running→done
example_cases.expected_output: Affected bubble has CSS transition of 0.5s applied. Color transitions from #534AB7 to #5cb8a5.
example_cases.setup: Render pet with running context. Fire status_changed event.

example_cases.description: Pulse animation triggers on done/stuck status change events
example_cases.expected_output: Affected BubbleState has is_pulsing=true. CSS pulse keyframe animation applied. is_pulsing resets to false after animation completes.
example_cases.setup: Render pet with running context. Fire status_changed to 'done'.

example_cases.description: Default state (all parked) shows all bubbles as semi-transparent gray
example_cases.input: Render pet where all contexts have status='parked'
example_cases.expected_output: All bubble elements have color=#928f9e with reduced opacity (semi-transparent).
example_cases.setup: Mock state with 3 contexts all in 'parked' status.

example_cases.description: is_processing=true shows subtle loading indicator on bubble during distillation
example_cases.input: Emit distillation_started event for a context
example_cases.expected_output: BubbleState.is_processing=true. Bubble renders with a loading animation (e.g., spinning dots or shimmer). On distillation_completed, is_processing=false.
example_cases.setup: Render pet with running context. Fire distillation_started then distillation_completed.

example_cases.description: Clicking a bubble emits on_bubble_click event with context_id and position
example_cases.input: User clicks on a bubble element
example_cases.expected_output: on_bubble_click event emitted via Tauri with { context_id: matching context, bubble_position: {x, y} }
example_cases.setup: Render pet with 2 contexts. Simulate click on one bubble.

example_cases.description: Dragging pet sprite calls save_pet_position with new coordinates
example_cases.input: User mousedown on pet sprite, drag to (500, 300), mouseup
example_cases.expected_output: on_pet_drag emitted with new_x=500, new_y=300. save_pet_position Tauri command invoked.
example_cases.setup: Render pet at initial position (100, 100). Simulate drag sequence.

example_cases.description: Idle animation plays at 4fps with <1% CPU
example_cases.input: Render pet in idle state (no status changes) for 5 seconds
example_cases.expected_output: Over 5 seconds, fewer than 25 rAF callbacks execute actual frame draws. CPU time delta (getrusage or performance.now) < 50ms for the 5s period, confirming <1% CPU.
example_cases.setup: Render pet. Mock requestAnimationFrame. Count actual frame updates over 5s.

example_cases.description: Bubble rendering GPU usage stays under 2% during animations
example_cases.expected_output: All bubble animation elements use only CSS transform and opacity properties (verified via getComputedStyle). No JS-driven style mutations during animation frames. Compositor-thread-only rendering confirmed.
example_cases.setup: Render pet with 4 contexts. Fire 4 status_changed events simultaneously.

example_cases.description: Sprite renders at 64x64 pixels from sprite sheet
example_cases.expected_output: Sprite element has width=64px, height=64px. Background-image uses sprite sheet with correct frame offset.
example_cases.setup: Provide SpriteConfig with sheet_url, frame_width=64, frame_height=64.

example_cases.description: Invalid state_change event payload is handled gracefully without crashing
example_cases.input: Emit stash://state-change event with malformed payload (missing context_id, invalid event_type)
example_cases.expected_output: Pet component does not crash. No bubble state change. Error logged to console.
example_cases.setup: Render pet with 2 contexts. Fire malformed event.

example_cases.description: Sprite sheet load failure shows fallback placeholder without crash
example_cases.input: Render pet with SpriteConfig pointing to non-existent sprite sheet URL
example_cases.expected_output: Image onerror fires. Fallback placeholder (colored rect or default icon) displayed. Component remains functional.
